underlying_goal: Run GSDR workflow commands to check progress, discuss Phase 10 (inference optimization), update GSDR, and plan Phase 10
friction_detail: Claude misapplied --auto flag in discuss-phase (auto-resolving decisions instead of auto-advancing) and failed to delegate heavy context-gathering to an agent, requiring user correction and a restart after a GSDR patch.
brief_summary: User ran several GSDR workflow commands; Claude initially mishandled discuss-phase mode but recovered after a tool update/patch and successfully produced CONTEXT.md, research, and verified plans for Phase 10.
